mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.real_name AS student_name, t.title AS task_title, t.course_id AS course_id, c.name AS course_name FROM training_result r LEFT JOIN student u ON r.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN training_task t ON r.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.*, u.real_name AS student_name, t.title AS task_title, t.course_id AS course_id, c.name AS course_name FROM training_result r LEFT JOIN student u ON r.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN training_task t ON r.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id ORDER BY r.id DESC

SELECT r.*, u.real_name AS student_name, t.title AS task_title, t.course_id AS course_id, c.name AS course_name FROM training_result r LEFT JOIN student u ON r.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN training_task t ON r.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id WHERE r.task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY r.id DESC

SELECT r.*, u.real_name AS student_name, t.title AS task_title, t.course_id AS course_id, c.name AS course_name FROM training_result r LEFT JOIN student u ON r.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN training_task t ON r.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id WHERE r.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY r.id DESC

SELECT r.*, u.real_name AS student_name, t.title AS task_title, t.course_id AS course_id, c.name AS course_name FROM training_result r LEFT JOIN student u ON r.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN training_task t ON r.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id WHERE r.task_id = #{taskId} AND r.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY r.upload_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.*, u.real_name AS student_name, t.title AS task_title, t.course_id AS course_id, c.name AS course_name FROM training_result r LEFT JOIN student u ON r.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN training_task t ON r.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY r.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO training_result (task_id, student_id, file_path, file_name, file_type, file_size, parsed_content, status) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{studentId}, #{filePath}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{parsedContent}, #{status})
